patch.value:
## Context

pm list (src/cli/commands/list.ts) supports: --updated-after, --updated-before, --created-after, --created-before, --assignee, --assignee-filter, --sprint, --release, --parent.
pm search (src/cli/commands/search.ts SearchOptions interface, lines 65-82) supports only: --status, --type, --tag, --priority, --deadline-before, --deadline-after.
SEARCH_FLAG_CONTRACTS (src/sdk/cli-contracts.ts lines 1189-1207) and TOOL_SEARCH_FILTER_OPTION_CONTRACTS (src/sdk/cli-contracts/tool-option-contracts.ts lines 63-73) also omit these flags, so MCP pm_search is also missing them.

## Acceptance criteria

- pm search accepts all 8 missing filter flags matching pm list semantics
- SEARCH_FLAG_CONTRACTS and TOOL_SEARCH_FILTER_OPTION_CONTRACTS updated to include new flags
- MCP pm_search tool parameter table updated
- Shell completions (src/cli/commands/completion.ts bash/zsh/fish search sections) updated
- Docs updated: docs/COMMANDS.md search section and docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md token-minimal retrieval table

## Evidence

- src/cli/commands/search.ts:65-82 (SearchOptions interface — missing fields)
- src/sdk/cli-contracts.ts:1189-1207 (SEARCH_FLAG_CONTRACTS — missing flags)
- src/sdk/cli-contracts/tool-option-contracts.ts:63-73 (TOOL_SEARCH_FILTER_OPTION_CONTRACTS)
- src/cli/commands/list.ts:24-54 (ListOptions — has all filters)
- docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md:107 (updated-after shown only for pm list-all, not search)
pm search filter parity with pm list: add --updated-after/before, --created-after/before, --assignee, --sprint, --release, --parent

pm search supports only a subset of pm list's filter flags. Missing: --updated-after, --updated-before, --created-after, --created-before, --assignee, --assignee-filter, --sprint, --release, --parent. Agents doing incremental 'what changed since my last window' queries naturally reach for pm search (semantic mode) but cannot scope by time or owner. The filter gap means agents must fall back to pm list (keyword only), losing semantic ranking.

- pm search accepts all 8 missing filter flags matching pm list semantics
- SEARCH_FLAG_CONTRACTS and TOOL_SEARCH_FILTER_OPTION_CONTRACTS updated to include new flags
- MCP pm_search tool parameter table updated
- Shell completions (src/cli/commands/completion.ts bash/zsh/fish search sections) updated
- Docs updated: docs/COMMANDS.md search section and docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md token-minimal retrieval table

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Scoping (2026-06-14): applyFilters (search.ts:658) only covers status/type/tag/priority/deadline+runtime. Add updated-after/before, created-after/before, assignee, sprint, release, parent matching pm list semantics. Bundled into PR feat/search-relevance-filter-parity-corpus.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: DONE. pm search now has FULL pm list filter parity. Added 8 flags with IDENTICAL list.ts semantics (copied exact parsing): --updated-after/--updated-before/--created-after/--created-before (parseTimestampWindow = resolveIsoOrRelative, signed relative -2h/-7d past, +1d future, units h/d/w/m), --assignee (trim; rejects none/null like list), --sprint (item.sprint===filter), --release (item.release===filter), --parent (item.parent===filter). Added to SearchOptions interface, applyFilters, register-list-query .option() (wording matched list.ts), SEARCH_FLAG_CONTRACTS, SEARCH_COMMANDER_STRING_OPTION_CONTRACTS, normalizeSearchOptions, TOOL_SEARCH_FILTER_OPTION_CONTRACTS (MCP pm_search exposes them — verified in contracts golden), completion zsh/fish, docs COMMANDS+AGENT_GUIDE. filters echo added to verbose (buildVerboseSearchFilters helper dedups count-only/empty/main paths) + compact summary. Tests: parity test covering assignee/sprint/release/parent/updated+created windows both directions + assignee-none rejection + compact echo. Note: search has no --assignee-filter (presence) flag, only direct --assignee match (list's unassigned-mode is list-specific).

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Shipped: 8 filter-parity flags matching pm list semantics — --updated-after/before, --created-after/before (signed-relative + ISO via resolveIsoOrRelative), --assignee (rejects none/null like list), --sprint, --release, --parent. Wired into SearchOptions, applyFilters, register-list-query commander, SEARCH_FLAG_CONTRACTS, TOOL_SEARCH_FILTER_OPTION_CONTRACTS (MCP pm_search), completion zsh/fish, docs. Contracts golden regenerated.

patch.value: Shipped 8 pm-list-parity filter flags on pm search
